info.title: AR Service
info.description:
Invoicing, collections, payment application, dunning, and cash flow forecasting.

**Authentication:** Bearer JWT. Tenant derived from JWT claims.
Permissions: `ar.read` for queries, `ar.mutate` for writes.

get.description:
Returns the stored projection. Callers must POST /api/ar/aging/refresh
first to ensure the projection is current.

post.summary: POST /api/ar/aging/refresh — recompute aging for a customer
post.description:
Recomputes aging buckets from invoices minus payments and upserts the
projection. Returns the updated snapshot. Emits ar.ar_aging_updated
into the outbox in the same transaction.

get.summary: GET /api/ar/disputes - List disputes with optional filters

post.summary: POST /api/ar/disputes/{id}/evidence - Submit evidence for a dispute
POST /api/ar/dunning/poll — poll and execute due dunning rows
post.description:
Claims due rows using FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED and executes the next
dunning action for each. Safe for concurrent workers — each row is
claimed exclusively.

get.summary: GET /api/ar/events/{id} - Get a single event by ID

post.description: Axum handler wrapper for the domain service `issue_credit_note`.

post.summary: POST /api/ar/invoices/:id/finalize - Mark invoice as finalized (open or paid)

post.description:
Write off an invoice as uncollectable bad debt. Idempotent on `write_off_id`.
Emits ar.invoice_written_off (REVERSAL) into the outbox atomically.

get.summary: GET /api/ar/payment-methods - List payment methods (with optional filtering)

post.summary: POST /api/ar/payment-methods - Add a new payment method

get.summary: GET /api/ar/payment-methods/:id - Get payment method by ID

post.summary: POST /api/ar/payment-methods/:id/set-default - Set payment method as default
POST /api/ar/recon/poll — claim and execute pending scheduled runs
POST /api/ar/recon/run — trigger a reconciliation matching run
post.description:
Matches unmatched succeeded payments against open invoices using
deterministic heuristic rules. Same inputs always produce same outputs.

post.summary: POST /api/ar/recon/schedule — create a scheduled reconciliation run

get.summary: GET /api/ar/refunds - List refunds with optional filters

post.summary: POST /api/ar/refunds - Create a refund for a charge

parameters.name: as_of
parameters.description: Filter rules effective on this date

parameters.name: invoice_id
parameters.description: Invoice ID to look up cached quote

get.summary: Returns AR collected-tax summaries as a deterministic CSV or JSON file.
Returns AR collected-tax summaries grouped by period and jurisdiction.

post.description:
Inserts a usage record into ar_metered_usage and emits ar.usage_captured
into the outbox atomically. Duplicate submissions with the same idempotency_key
are a no-op that returns the original record.

Guard → Mutation → Outbox atomicity: all three happen in one transaction.

AddPaymentMethodRequest.description: Request body for adding a payment method

ApiError.description:
Standard API error envelope.

`error` is a machine-readable code (`not_found`, `validation_error`, etc.).
`message` is human-readable.  `request_id` is populated from the tracing
context already present in request extensions.  `details` carries per-field
errors for 422 responses.

PaginatedResponse_Charge.description:
Generic paginated response envelope.

Every list endpoint returns this wrapper so consumers get consistent
pagination metadata regardless of the underlying entity type.
